name: Norwegian Nynorsk
notes: Norwegian Nynorsk — minority written standard (~15%). Based on western Norwegian dialects. Alveolar /r/ [r]; less retroflexion than Bokmål/Eastern. More diphthongs preserved from Old Norse: ei, au, øy. Source: Kristoffersen (2000).

sources.author: Haugen, E.
sources.title: The Scandinavian Languages: An Introduction to their History
